hdb4fb929g2c2dg4433ga925g7a21d3971334: Quite the cosy set-up you have here. I'll just make myself comfortable - thank you so much.
he858b2c6g37cbg41fagb614g3818d130645d: I was just settling in and reviewing my latest findings. Mind flayers, cultists, and of course, your esteemed company!
h5819c798g6712g4d61g9d3bg8debf31a69af: My friend! How do you fare?
hd6d77cbbg5c4cg4ef4gbe4cg7f0d5e686f05: Has your research turned up anything that might help with this parasite problem?
h19a74f28ga957g4036gaa8cg4d128590bdd0: Not yet, I'm afraid. But my expectations are very, very high!
hb888fe07g7070g4afdgb468g59c1f449ce08: I want help with my parasite. By any means necessary.
h7522e418g28c1g4784ga81ag385bf23f4996: The creature's in your brain, somewhere behind the orbital socket. I could attempt to remove it. I've a needle in my tunic...
hc37480ceg23ebg47cdgb62fgc14348d0144e: If we managed it, we'd have a specimen of incredible rarity on our hands.
hc99717c7gaa66g4473gbd2bg996d8c350cf8: What do you know about mind flayers?
h848ff4f2ga2c6g4282g848bg673f335d2dc0: Why, I'm practically an expert. They've tentacles, you know. Quite shocking.
hdad2e80bg9c2eg473dga825g728c47c7a6df: The druid Halsin had some kind of mind flayer specimen in a jar in his quarters. A replica, no doubt, but truly fascinating to see up close.
hc8020c60g1130g4f2bga299gf6eb14055f45: Here?! On the Sword Coast? Impossible.
hc462054eg057ag4409g9070gf8c5c82f8fcc: Not only have I encountered a mind flayer, I've killed one.
he2bd0a73g0ec8g4f39gb40fg6e826e9cd6ff: I was captured by mind flayers before. I'm lucky to be alive.
hfa34e72dg832cg4fb1g96ebga78275e97f23: Tell me: have you noticed any residual psionic malaise since the alleged encounter?
hf14ea62bg256dg4128g9039g97ee14e5e770: I have. And the mind flayer infected me with a parasite.
h253a3847g9c55g4c3cgb4d1gafd8095713b8: Malaise is one word for it. More like... psychic transference?
h590a2df7g7a72g42d0g9a54gf85aca3776a5: Illithids - their technical name - form a hive mind. One shouldn't be able to hear their dark whispers... unless...
hcde02815gaa8ag4c96ga48bg278cff829e43: ... unless you've been infected by one of their parasites.
h006d114dg0132g4917gb7bag4fcf05ffe417: Hm. Are you much familiar with the process of ceremorphosis? That is - what happens when a mind flayer parasite infects a living host.
hccddb92eg663eg463dg8a7fg20c80790368c: I can't attest to the specifics. But I do know that not long after insertion, the host (that's you) turns into a mind flayer.
h043d8293ge7aeg4971gb445gae10cf45a92c: As there's not a tentacle on your head, I can only assume you haven't been infected.
hbf957e0bg3bcfg451bg8241g9bb48212d064: No. Haven't noticed anything like that.
h3c7f8218gd804g4f54g9e43g12764c0bc2ce: I killed a mind flayer in its lair, aboard a nautiloid.
hab1f29b3g451cg4ac4gbe04gbd3b1c6287a3: You're either an excellent storyteller... or you've experienced something quite exceptional.
hd95fe4aagc1deg4793g9040gbaeccff2f13f: I've also been infected with one of their parasites.
h9ba852fcgf2c5g45f2g95b6gace8c4325255: A mind flayer planted one of their larva in my brain.
h6d362a7agc0a6g4b2fg9fbbg7a16519a773b: That's quite impossible. You'd have undergone ceremorphosis by now.
h81bf50d5g48bfg4317ga86bg7314bf7f57e3: I can't attest to the specifics. But I do know that not long after insertion, the host (that's you) turns into a mind flayer.
h16ada5fag1705g4f04ga4feg491709e22fc5: As there's not a tentacle on your head, I can only assume you haven't been infected.
h65fe94b9g30adg4323g8e47g561d6bf98420: If only your disbelief could alter facts.
h0ab6a128g1581g472dga40fg5d061ffcad81: If what you say were true, you'd be a mind flayer by now.
hd8bce8efg8296g4157ga2dcg07fcb4cb86b3: You. Infected by a mind flayer. It's ridiculous...
h693adc6cgd31bg4f5ag8a2fg2973366099b7: Examine me. Find out for yourself.
h57a76b0dg4c8fg40degab48gcf5325de54dc: Perhaps that's for the best. I'd be irresponsible not to debunk such a strange claim.
hd0f3abf8g6d79g4261ga187g3b62d367f492: If I just peer in your eye, I could quickly...
h548e40cdgf0c1g442fgaf52gc38e3354fecf: I want rid of this thing by any means necessary.
h190f7575gf8f7g4032gaa0agb3f9e4ec3a5c: I'll need to research the particulars, however. Give me a bit of time, and I'll have this little issue sorted.
h8f9cf490ga42eg4d9cg9363g9835242aced6: My research turned up a rather brilliant technique that seems quite actionable.
hb276eea3g6016g4976gbeafg27926ebc2506: It's not too deep. Just behind the orbital socket. I could attempt an extraction. I've a needle in my tunic, after all...
h60dc0d97g3e15g4f7fga763ga6d7b80cb420: How many times have you done this before?
h13485a8cgbc7cg4141g99beg3aa049b97515: I assure you, I've dreamt of it a thousand times over.
hf7008eeagf3d9g4efeg9174gdfbb7596d6c3: *Volo carefully holds one of your eyes open and begins to prod uncertainly with the needle.*
h9a46b7c1g7bcdg41f3g9056gf025932dfd9b: Endure the discomfort. Let him carry on.
hf6ddff29g5890g4e10gaa80gfc104d985daf: *The needle finds the gap between eyeball and socket. Volo frowns and begins to push.*
hb533515egb602g492fg8517g482d5e9cd53a: *Pain shoots through your body as the needle snags on your optic nerve.*
h443689dbg560ag4641g9653g30883d588c0a: *The needle see-saws back and forth, plucking the nerve like a harp string.*
hef67680egf702g4c05g846dgb7fa47bb85f5: Oh bother. There's some obstacle in the way. I shall need a more robust implement.
hd945d785g57a3g457ag9a1fg310dfe32f233: *Volo carefully withdraws the needle from your eye. Then, reaching into his bag, he produces an ice pick.*
hbf74c4fegff30g4b39g808cgd307665dfd5b: Eye the implement, but allow him to proceed.
h9b4c7a57g0751g4f80gb803g48e3204ee2ff: *Volo slowly brings the ice pick closer to your eye.*
ha81360bdg4589g46a7g899eg6e98f416b40f: *Cold metal presses against the skin beneath your brow, and then...*
h91a5882cg1fdeg4c72gbcaegafcd589db754: Do you feel that? I believe we have the blighter on the run!
h67e2df13g7aa1g496cg8e3fg665ea2c45489: I agree! It's a feisty critter. Just... a little... further...
h8c250ca1gedc9g42fag8400gb66cf4c25084: *Volo tears the pick from your brain with a violent jerk; your eye plops down into the mud.*
h014f4201g2468g4d22g8f90ga45b0c03f9df: *He pauses, looks down at your eye, and recoils slightly as it sinks into the mud.*
h4ed68c96g9c81g415ag937cg66617d7e79ba: There appears to be an amount of... cosmetic damage.
hb6b7e488g2302g4291gbbdbgf31306d6e3a4: YOU KNOCKED MY BLOODY EYE OUT!
h4d977f2fg7f29g4052gbdf0g7f41f1a0b375: Please, try not to overexert yourself. You're in a rather fragile state at present.
h982b7f84gd881g429dgb9aeg5050751bec37: I can't help but feel partly responsible. Perhaps there's something more I can do...
hdbe11ed8g0db5g4242gb958g7451fc6bdf07: Take this. A far superior relic to that old jelly you were chained to.
ha12338b7g8c29g4b96g9ebfg56f1b8eb7ad3: Try it on for size. And, erm, it was... very nice to have met you.
h3031fd27gf9e4g4d6bgbb88gdb74d9d7ce75: I'm sure you'll sort out your little brain problem one way or another. Far away from here, if you've a heart.
h1ede3e47gdc61g42fdgbf9ag5ed528d07e53: Take this. A far superior relic to that old jelly you were chained to.
hef699633g6f02g4d45ga975g77c26ed1044a: Hm. I... seem to have misplaced it. It was a fine bauble, a replacement for your eye.
hc544679ag7d14g4b2bgac26gd5040cb7ef14: Have it your own way! The important thing is we've learned a great deal about these parasites.
ha3484b09g630fg4943g8989g43fe36463e9d: Specifically, how not to extract them.
h0970bf49g1382g48a2gb025ga963343e4524: I must depart soon, but I insist you take this. You'll thank me when you try it on for size.
hc02168ccgac1fg49cbg8043gc1dd0629699d: Oh. Fantastic! That squint does wonders for your gravitas, in my humble opinion.
h428ef3f5g687eg45fega88dgbe3e086c4e11: Though, erm, perhaps there's something we can do...
h2b1fe3bfg0d47g4596g9458ga89727cd94a8: I can't seem to see through one of my eyes.
h161b366fg93abg4039gbaf0g7a1516f45022: Yes, quite. There is some... mild trauma.
h805918d3gaafcg4cd8gbc81g69213ff9106e: Looks like I'm going to need to find help elsewhere...
h7f454a9bgcb9eg411eg9420g8133fd48dd01: Perhaps you should visit a healer? You could have them check on your eye at the same time.
hce49b24bg0886g4332g9fc8g300ee315be2d: Stop. This is never going to work.
h89689bf1g2aa4g4742gb786g83956f92b556: Are you sure? If I don't intervene, the parasite will continue to gestate inside you.
h56e912aeg5850g4766g9b01gb1ad218d0aeb: I don't have much choice then. Fine, continue.
hbeccfd13g08a1g48dfg9e13g525596482a97: No, no. This is too much. Knock it off.
h78f9159eg0821g44ccg96ddgd7a8e2423c2f: Are you certain? We're nearly there...
h0a15410ag0817g48d5ga759g0b03d2ef5bc8: As you wish. But when your skin starts to peel away, remember - Volo offered to help.
hcc352e6ag7102g4864g90d8g0fa541bc8f11: That obstacle is my eye. Stop at once.
h59c35508g82aeg4cf4gbd9ag3267f9ce3579: Regrettable. Mark my words - ceremorphosis will be far more painful than this procedure!
hc417a635g7003g4467g8995g0a4dd762a1b9: As you wish, my friend. When the transformation occurs, I can only hope you are far away from me!
ha2b1580dg3f0eg416fg9a8cg4903941683d5: Do you have the faintest idea of what you're doing?
h8a29c3afg7aa6g43f4g8117g0bc062863a19: Don't fidget! The needle must slip behind your eye, not through it!
hbf8a907ag0365g40e2g8954gce9693b3a98e: I'd rather get a second opinion.
hf66d83cfgc3c0g4d13ga22eg2100007f5fe1: You won't find a more learned opinion on this matter, I assure you.
h397d82e8g417bg4f4agb605g98110d93c27a: You only have a matter of days to live. Don't dally, my friend.
hfce04e68g15d2g4147ga31cg86504c5d6886: No - I only have one good eye left.
h3011cdfcg05f5g4708gb40ag9a7e426c1ac9: Sorry, but I have no eyes left to spare.
h5d33e2c5gf35dg4e05g8aa5g92930e6bc257: Quit the shouting. Can you help?
h03349fc1gcf0fg46c5gae66g0d9adb404443: I... I mean... I mean yes, I suppose I can.
h3e6601ebgc22ag4e94g9e51g526c0551c0a4: Still... there'd be no harm in my taking a teensy look, would there? I know all the signs...
ha7260198gdccag4381g9057g9bbfcc4e7537: Doubts aside, you should keep your distance from me.
h2171db02g90a8g40b3g8d9fg2254a87c1b48: Hrm. I'd be irresponsible not to debunk such a strange claim.
h2d311d8bg609eg42c9g9086gc6e467739596: I don't want you poking around in my head.
hc83ecaa9g8299g45d2gb949g8d63abb40061: As you wish. But I'd be quite careful to whom I go spreading such rumours.
h4eb82139g9259g4258gaebcg9cffaaf36590: Ridiculous though such a claim may be, a mind flayer is a terrible thing to be.
hc07c0e34geafag401ag81ffg559fec9d1b47: And their parasites? Do you know anything about them?
h28b0b24agb915g4b4bgacc9g78b07723cbec: As a matter of fact, I do. But why do you?
h1472e4adg68a3g42beg8362g5997b597d548: How did you find the camp?
h619918aagdc2eg4238ga188gdee57c142fd9: Finding is my job, my friend. If there's anything in the world worth knowing, I assure you, I do.
h5d9c8815g4c20g4cf1g8c18ga30cbe3b0799: *He taps the pick and your eye springs from its socket, dangling wetly on your cheek.*
